import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import ta
def generate_signals(df, params):
    atr_window = params['atr_window']
    rsi_window = params['rsi_window']
    momentum_window = params['momentum_window']
    threshold = params['threshold']
    
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_window).average_true_range()
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_window)
    df['momentum'] = df['close'].pct_change(periods=momentum_window)
    
    long_condition = (df['momentum'] < -threshold) & (df['rsi'] < 30)
    short_condition = (df['momentum'] > threshold) & (df['rsi'] > 70)
    
    signals = pd.Series(np.where(long_condition, 1, np.where(short_condition, -1, 0)), index=df.index).astype(int)
    return signals
rationale: USD/JPY exhibits momentum reversal tendencies when extreme momentum is confirmed by RSI overbought/oversold conditions and adjusted for volatility using ATR.
